steps.title: Track the shift in regard
steps.content: The passage says Bennett knew scholarly institutions considered his ephemera collection worthless. It then contrasts that earlier dismissal with the Bodleian Library's later acquisition of the collection because of its potential value to researchers.

steps.title: Choose both sides
steps.content: A focuses on modern research difficulty, B focuses on institutional collecting challenges, and C supports the view that ephemera has no scholarly value. The Bennett example shows both low earlier regard and later recognition of possible usefulness. The answer is D.
